testcase.name: test_lead_persists_with_car_fields

failure.message: AssertionError: car_year missing/wrong: None assert None == '2023' + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfe6f05ebb680>('car_year') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfe6f05ebb680> = {'ad_id': '', 'address': '123 Demo St', 'adgroup_id': '', 'campaign_id': '', ...}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/backend_test.py:123: in test_lead_persists_with_car_fields assert lead.get("car_year") == "2023", f"car_year missing/wrong: {lead.get('car_year')}" E AssertionError: car_year missing/wrong: None E assert None == '2023' E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfe6f05ebb680>('car_year') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfe6f05ebb680> = {'ad_id': '', 'address': '123 Demo St', 'adgroup_id': '', 'campaign_id': '', ...}.get
